title: Klein Tools 9375 Tape Measure, Heavy-Duty Measuring Tape with 7.5 m Metric Double-Hook Double-Sided Nylon Reinforced Blade, Metal Belt Clip
features: Tape Measure with 16-Foot Reach (standout plus estimated extension of typical user) and a 13-Foot Standout (4 m standout)
Uncluttered, easy-to-read metric and imperial (SAE) scales on front and back side of tape
Heavy-duty, tough, durable nylon-coating protects blade printing and delivers longer blade life
Retraction speed brake controls blade speed and protects fingers from touching blade
description: Product Description Klein Tools Tape Measures deliver performance and durability expected by professional tradespeople. Safeguarded by a thick and durable protective nylon-coating, the Tough Blade stands out to 4 meters. Able to endure the toughest of jobsite conditions, this tool also features a strong magnetic double hook, easy-to-read bold lines in both metric and imperial measurement scales, and a retraction brake. Safety Warning Always wear eye protection.Do NOT open case. Spring motor is under tension and opening may cause injury.Not insulated. Do NOT use on live circuits. Avoid magnetic contact with sensitive electronic or computer equipment.To avoid personal injury and prevent damage to product, do not allow the blade to retract into case at full speed.

specifications_table.Material: ‎PLA_(Polylactic_Acid), PC_(Polycarbonate), ABS_(Acrylonitrile_Butadiene_Styrene), PE_(Polyethylene), Nylon, Plastic Case with Steel Blade & Steel & PC-ABS with TPR Overmolding
specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Imperial (SAE) and Metric Measurement Scales; Tough Blade; 4-meter Standout; Double-Sided Blade Printing; Attachment Channel to Tether Tape Measure
